description: Italian SDVECU RESTRICTED login (sub-user with no SCH/BILLS/etc). JWT cap claim is unreliable for arming: lists ARMNIGHT but panel rejects ARMNIGHT1; omits ARMDAY but panel accepts ARMDAY1. See italy_owner_partial_only.json for the OWNER-login counterpart and panel_truth section.
scenario_notes: RESTRICTED-role login (sub-user); arming-relevant cap subset is identical to OWNER for this panel.
Has perimeter, but JWT does NOT advertise PERI capability — peri must be detected via alarmPartitions[id='02'] with non-empty enterStates (RESTRICTED users don't see the SCH service).
This is the case that forces _detect_peri to retain the alarmPartitions branch: JWT-only peri detection yields a false negative here.

The single 'partial' UI button on the Italian web app issues ARMDAY1 — even though ARMDAY is absent from cap. The cap claim is NOT an authoritative oracle for command acceptance; the Interior sub-panel must therefore expose all interior modes.
